title: cyanea coriacea var. hardyi
intro: Cyanea coriacea var. hardyi, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and flavonoids. Cyanea coriacea var. hardyi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
